answer: Three protocols share the same primary endpoint (change from baseline in HbA1c at Week 24) as study ABC-2024: Protocol XYZ-2019 (Phase III), Protocol DEF-2021 (Phase II), and Protocol GHI-2023 (Phase IIb). All definitions trace to the same endpoint ontology entry EP-HBA1C-W24.

lineageSummary: Endpoint lineage resolved via Vector DB entity graph: ABC-2024 → EP-HBA1C-W24 ← XYZ-2019, DEF-2021, GHI-2023.
